description:
You are acting as a lab archivist. Digitize the scanned notebook page located at /home/ga/Desktop/notebook_scan.jpg into the 'Legacy Archive' project in SciNote. Create a task for this page named with the format '[Date] - [Experiment]' using the details found in the scan. Transcribe the 'Observations' from the image into the task's description or a comment, and upload the 'notebook_scan.jpg' file as an attachment to the task.

SciNote Login:
- E-mail: admin@scinote.net
- Password: inHisHouseAtRlyehDeadCthulhuWaitsDreaming
